description: Typical fun-doc output on get_stat_list_prev_link — recognizes the validated accessor + linked-list traversal pattern, plate identifies the prev-pointer semantics.

captured.name: GetStatListPrev
captured.plate: Reads the prev-link pointer from a StatList at offset +0x34. Validates the list pointer is non-null and the magic number at offset 0 matches 0x01020304. On success returns the 32-bit pointer — this is the reverse-traversal link in a doubly-linked StatList chain. Returns 0 on null-pointer or magic mismatch.
